description_long: This is a tall, modern apartment building with a rectangular footprint and a symmetrical facade. The exterior is dominated by vertical rows of balconies and large windows, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The building features a light gray facade with green-tinted glass elements and horizontal balcony railings. At the base, there are amenities such as a pool and a tennis court, suggesting a high-rise residential complex with luxury features. The roof is flat and includes mechanical structures, likely for utilities or HVAC systems. The overall design emphasizes verticality and regularity, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A tall, modern apartment building with symmetrical balconies, large windows, and amenities like a pool and tennis court at the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with evenly spaced balconies and a central entrance area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's narrow profile and the depth of the balconies, as well as rooftop structures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional amenities at the base, including a pool and tennis court, and the full height of the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same narrow profile and vertical window arrangement as the other side.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in vertical columns with consistent spacing, aligned symmetrically across the facade and paired with balconies.
